name: agent-design-patterns
description: Full local copy of huangjia2019/agent-design-patterns packaged for Codex task preflight calibration and pattern lookup.

interface.shortDescription: Use ADPS patterns before and during Codex tasks.
interface.longDescription: Packages the full huangjia2019/agent-design-patterns repository locally and adds a Codex skill for task preflight calibration, pattern selection, and repository navigation.
